title: Water Supply Collapse
descrition: Recently, Marvel city experienced a water supply collapse. The transformers that pumped the water exploded, causing enormous inconvenience to the population. When the utility managed to replace the transformers, scaled, the water supply had to back to normal. For this, a rotation of supply was carried out in the first week, dividing the city by areas: Area 1: Moon Knight, Daredevil, Jessica Jones Area 2: WandaVision, Loki, Hawkeye The rotation followed the following scale: Area 1 - water available from 8 am to 8 pm on Tuesday; Area 2 - water available from 2 am on Wednesday;
format_input: Neighborhood name Day of the week
format_output: Water Available or Water not Available
